tool_calls:
set -e
APP_NAME='myservice'
APP_PORT=8080
DB_HOST='db.prod.internal'
DB_PORT=5432
LOG_LEVEL='warn'

mkdir -p /etc/app
cat <<EOF > /etc/app/config.yaml
app:
  name: ${APP_NAME}
  port: ${APP_PORT}
database:
  host: ${DB_HOST}
  port: ${DB_PORT}
logging:
  level: ${LOG_LEVEL}
EOF

cat /etc/app/config.yaml
